home.introduce2: Outside of work, I enjoy exploring delicious food and traveling.
home.introduce3: I occasionally share thoughts on tech development and travel adventures!
home.introduceDetail1: I graduated with a degree in Computer Science and currently work as a Full-Stack Engineer at Yuanta Bank, with {year} years of development experience.
home.introduceDetail2: Starting from Android development in university, I transitioned into web frontend and built expertise across Gigabyte, Envotions, and Owlting, before expanding into full-stack development covering Vue 3 / Nuxt 3 frontend and Java Spring Boot backend.
home.introduceDetail3: Outside of work, I stay current with frontend technologies and backend architecture, always striving to improve code quality and development efficiency.
home.introduceDetail4: I also love traveling and exploring new cuisines — feel free to connect if we share the same interests!
home.contact-text: Here is my contact information if you'd like to get in touch.

tag.notFound: No articles found for this tag.

jobInfo.workContentYuanta: Joined Yuanta Bank as a full-time Full-Stack Engineer. Responsible for requirements interviews and SA documentation for the DrillGold Business App Web, as well as leading full-stack development, maintenance, and optimization — covering Vue 3 frontend and Java Spring Boot backend APIs.
jobInfo.workContentNextleap: Dispatched to Yuanta Bank via NextLeap Singapore. Participated in the development of the DrillGold Business App Web, handling frontend interface implementation, business logic development, and frontend-backend service integration.
jobInfo.workContentGigabyte: Initially responsible for developing and maintaining internal Android apps and Java backend services. Later transitioned to frontend development due to increasing web demand, primarily working on the internal CMS platform using Vue 2. Participated in the redevelopment of the e7line e-commerce website by converting the original .NET site into a frontend-backend separated architecture using Nuxt 2, focusing on SEO optimization.
jobInfo.workContentEnvotions: Assisted in the frontend-backend separation of the main website, and developed activity and sub-websites. Primarily used Nuxt 3 and Vue 3 for development.
jobInfo.workContentOwlting: Collaborated on revamping the PayNow system, working with the backend to build an official website and a frontend-backend separated CMS system. Also assisted in developing payment SDKs.
